query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A person with short dark hair and eyeglasses wears a brown hooded jacket with dark shoulder panels and a raised collar over a white crew-neck shirt. They stand against a smooth, pale wall. A bright yellow-orange light source in front of their lower face obscures part of their features and creates bright reflections on their glasses. Their right hand is raised near their chest.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A flash-lit snapshot shows a person with short dark hair and eyeglasses wearing a brown hooded jacket with dark shoulder panels over a white crew-neck shirt against a pale wall. Harsh, direct flash lighting and blown-out overexposure from a bright yellow-orange flame in front of their lower face completely obscure their mouth and jaw while creating specular reflections on the glasses. Mixed color temperatures leave the background cool while the subject’s skin and white shirt take on an unsettling reddish-orange cast. The casual framing and direct flash give the image an amateur snapshot energy.
